---
name: Paper Section Iteration
about: Plan, draft, or refine a specific section of the research paper.
title: 'Paper: [Section Number] - [Section Title]'
labels: 'paper'
assignees: ''
---

## 1. Target Section
*Specify which section this issue targets (e.g., Section 03 - Problem Formulation, Section 06 - Evaluation).*

## 2. Section Objective
*What is the main goal of this section? What should a reader take away after reading it?*

## 3. Core Claims
*List the primary academic or empirical claims made in this section.*

## 4. Empirical Evidence Needed
*What data from the evaluation (e.g., specific tables, charts, or run statistics) must be embedded or referenced in this section to support the claims?*

## 5. Related Work & Citations
*What existing literature, classic papers, or adjacent frameworks must be cited in this section? Provide keys from references.bib if known.*

## 6. Acceptance Criteria
*What is required to close this issue? (e.g., "Draft is compiled, reviewed for systems-minded prose, references are verified, and tables/charts are populated with Q3 run data").*
